sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 75:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 75:1
items.html: In the first expansion, there was only one expansion and one departure, though it departed gradually. However, in the second expansion, it expanded by and order of expanding and not expanding, creating ten exits and ten entries until it expanded to Malchut. (Item 20)
